videos.headline: Jimmy Horn Jr.'s touchdown negated after he taunts defender
videos.description: Jimmy Horn Jr. thinks he has a touchdown, but it's ruled off after he threw up a peace sign at his defender.

videos.headline: How on earth did Travis Hunter catch this?!
